# PERF-056 positive: c.JSON called inside a for-range loop in a Gin handler
lang: go
file: PERF-056-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ListUsers(c *gin.Context) {
	users := []string{"alice", "bob", "carol"}
	for _, u := range users {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"user": u})
	}
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
